title: Search Function Not Working
excerpt:
Hello! 
Found some slightly relevant questions but nothing exactly pertaining to this issue. It seems the search function doesn’t work on my board, which has 1627 items. Even when I filter the search to one or two column…

posts.author: cdimamaglow (cdimamaglow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Found some slightly relevant questions but nothing exactly pertaining to this issue. It seems the search function doesn’t work on my board, which has 1627 items. Even when I filter the search to one or two columns it can’t pick out a name or a specific email. Is there any way to reset this?

“Search Everything” never seems to work either- i’m not sure what its even searching.

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve not had that issue. Are you searching for data that’s in the ‘name’ column?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: cdimamaglow (cdimamaglow)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’m searching for data that’s in any column- name, email, assignee etc. Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: WIthout ‘seeing’ it, I can’t provide support. Doesn’t sound like something that should be happening. I’d recommend contacting support@monday.com
